note: Community-curated. Unverified. Verify independently before acting on any item.

items.title: CVE-2025-59536 and CVE-2026-21852 patched in Claude Code
items.summary: Two vulnerabilities allowing remote code execution and API key theft via malicious repository config files were patched in October 2025 and January 2026 respectively.

items.title: Anthropic source code leak exposes Claude Code internals
items.summary: Approximately 500,000 lines of Claude Code source code across 1,900 files were accidentally included in a release package. No customer data was involved.

items.title: First documented AI-autonomous cyberattack at scale
items.summary: Anthropic documented a campaign (GTG-1002) in which an AI agent conducted reconnaissance, exploitation, and data exfiltration with minimal human direction.
